NoteHosanna is a transliteration of the Hebrew Hosia-na, meaning Save, we pray or Save now, which became a shout of praise; see Psalm 118:25; also in verse 15.
NotePsalm 118:26
NoteOr “Hosanna in the highest heaven!” See Psalm 118:25 and Psalm 148:1.
